docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, YICK ON HEARING SET FOR MAY-07-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, MEGAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, YICK ON $7,412.72 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,582.72, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
